goal: Implement the FE v6 route-contract mockup from docs/mockup/mib_fe_mockup_v6_routes_contract.html in the desktop app, resolve the canonical mockup doc drift, and produce FE verification evidence without changing backend, DB, worker, training, export, benchmark, or release sign-off logic.
head: bd30af9
blocked_scope: DB schema, migration, or model changes
Training, benchmark, packaging, export runtime, or Docker behavior changes
Benchmark number edits or invented benchmark claims
Foundation plan or handoff edits outside the explicit FE implementation scope
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This FE gate may update the desktop app implementation, generated desktop dist copy from the source build, FE tests/e2e, UX/mockup canonical references, WORKING closeout, PABCD state, and FE verification artifacts only.
warnings: This phase does not make M6-RC GO; real digest-pinned Docker image runtime evidence remains a separate blocker.
Plain pnpm is not on PATH and the Corepack shim fails signature verification in this shell; required FE commands use cached pnpm 9.15.0 directly under strict Node 20.18.1.
Mockup benchmark-like numbers must not be promoted into product benchmark claims.
No backend, DB, worker, schema, training, benchmark, package, export, or release-signoff behavior may change in this gate.

phase_notes.plan: Implement v6 route-contract builder UX in apps/desktop, align canonical mockup references, add focused FE evidence and tests, then stage/commit/push after verification.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING/CONTEXT, SSOT FE/v0 RC sections, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE screen/DoD rules, UX_SPEC canonical mockup rule, v6 mockup, M6 FE review and CTO blockers, desktop source/tests, and package scripts.
phase_notes.build: Implemented v6 route-contract builder in apps/desktop with toolbox categories, block canvas, route board, inspector tabs, contract section preview, route presets, compile/test/download actions, canonical mockup doc updates, and FE evidence artifact.
phase_notes.check: Passed task JSON, cached pnpm unit tests, desktop build, existing M1 browser e2e, teacher packet browser e2e, new FE v6 browser e2e with keyboard/a11y smoke, file-size hard-limit check, and unstaged diff whitespace check.

pabcd.approved_scope: Desktop FE v6 mockup implementation and FE verification evidence only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No non-FE product behavior, schema, benchmark, export, Docker, foundation, handoff, or RC sign-off changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Create scoped FE v6 implementation contract.
pabcd.build: FE v6 route-contract builder implemented and evidence recorded.
pabcd.check: All required verification passed except staged diff check, which runs after staging.
